bleeding.title: Bleeding
steps: Apply pressure dressing or tourniquet above the wound
Raise the limb above heart level
Don't release pressure until bleeding stops
If tourniquet - record the time applied

fracture.title: Fracture
steps: Immobilize the limb with a splint (improvised materials)
Don't try to set the bone

burn.title: Burn
steps: Cool under running water for 15-20 minutes

unconscious.title: Unconsciousness
steps: If no breathing - start artificial respiration

poison.title: Poisoning
steps: Don't induce vomiting if chemical poisoning
